overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit city at night. The character travels from a covered arcade, across a busy intersection, and along sidewalks lined with towering holographic advertisements and cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the covered arcade with red neon lighting overhead

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure with red neon strip lighting providing shelter from rain
large glowing advertisement displaying product imagery on the left wall
thick structural column supporting the overhead walkway structure

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered commercial arcade bathed in red neon light. Holographic advertisements line the left wall while the wet concrete sidewalk reflects the overhead lighting. The space is sheltered from the rain with a dense urban canopy overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with yellow striped crosswalk

events.description: exits covered arcade into open intersection with visible sky and traffic
black sedan drives through the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: stepping onto the yellow crosswalk and walking across the wet asphalt intersection

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection
person holding black umbrella walking in the same direction

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt
elevated pedestrian walkway or monorail track spanning the intersection
tall buildings covered in bright neon signage and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered arcade into a wide open intersection. They cross the yellow-striped crosswalk as vehicles pass through and neon-lit towers rise in the background. The environment shifts from sheltered red lighting to exposed mixed neon and street lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk with pink building facade

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk past various storefronts and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: person with umbrella walking ahead on the sidewalk
pedestrian in blue pants walking in same direction near storefronts

entered.detail: building front illuminated with bright pink neon lighting and digital displays
floating holographic ad displays projecting from building walls
tall street lamps with bright white lighting along the road edge

segments.scene_description: Walking along the exposed sidewalk, the character passes a striking pink neon building facade on the left with holographic advertisements floating at street level. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant neon colors while other pedestrians share the walkway and sparse traffic moves along the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection corner with towering neon skyscrapers and overhead structures

events.description: camera tilts upward to view overhead building structures, bridges, and neon signage

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection while looking up at the towering building facades and overhead structures

notable_agents.action: woman looking at phone while walking across the intersection

entered.detail: skyscraper with glass facade rising high above the street level
yellow pedestrian crossing markings visible ahead at the next intersection
large red neon sign shaped like a heart mounted on building facade

segments.scene_description: Approaching the next intersection, the character looks upward to reveal towering glass skyscrapers and dense overhead bridge structures crisscrossing between buildings. Neon signs and holographic displays cover the vertical surfaces while pedestrians navigate the crossing below.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with parked vehicles and neon storefronts

events.description: camera returns to forward-facing position after looking upward

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past parked vehicles and oncoming pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man with black umbrella walking toward the camera

entered.detail: vehicles parked along the right side of the street including a teal sedan
ground floor commercial entrances with illuminated doorways

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to street level as the character continues walking past parked cars on the right and street-level shops on the left. The density of pedestrians decreases while the neon-lit urban environment continues with wet reflective surfaces and opposing foot traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, red-lit commercial arcade into the expansive, rain-soaked openness of a neon-drenched metropolis. It begins within the covered arcade where holographic advertisements line the walls and red light reflects off wet concrete, before the character emerges into a wide intersection to cross a yellow-striped crosswalk under a mix of street and neon lighting. As the character moves along the exposed sidewalk, the environment shifts toward vibrant pink hues from a striking building facade and floating holograms that shimmer on the damp pavement. The camera then tilts upward to reveal a dense canopy of glass skyscrapers and crisscrossing overhead bridges before returning to street level to pass parked cars and quiet shops. Finally, the scene settles into a steady walk through the urban landscape, where the density of pedestrians thins amidst the persistent glow of reflective surfaces and towering signs.
